AboutBadgesDescription: Every merged PR earns achievement badges based on milestones. Unlock badges for your first PR, tenth PR, earnings milestones, and top leaderboard positions. Compete on the public leaderboard ranked by total earnings. All pull requests are public.
AboutStoryDescription: PrTask was founded with a simple idea: what if every code contribution had a clear, guaranteed bounty attached to it? Born from the frustration of unpaid open-source labor and opaque freelancing platforms, PrTask launched to create a marketplace where pull requests are the universal currency of work. From our first bounty to thousands of completed tasks, we have grown into a global community of developers and clients who share a commitment to transparent, merit-based collaboration.
AcceptableUseAccountIntegrityDescription: Users must maintain one account. Creating multiple accounts to claim tasks or manipulate the system results in permanent suspension.
AcceptableUseCodeQualityDescription: All submitted pull requests must be original work. Automated or AI-generated code must be disclosed in the PR description.
AcceptableUseConductAutomated: Using automated tools or bots to interact with the platform without prior written authorization
AcceptableUseConductDescription: The following conduct is strictly prohibited on PrTask and may result in immediate enforcement action:
AcceptableUseConductDiscrimination: Engaging in discriminatory, hateful, or threatening behavior toward any user based on race, gender, religion, nationality, disability, or any other protected characteristic
AcceptableUseConductExploiting: Exploiting platform vulnerabilities, APIs, or payment systems for unauthorized gain
AcceptableUseConductFakeTasks: Creating fake tasks or pull requests to artificially inflate earnings or manipulate payment flows
AcceptableUseConductInauthentic: Engaging in coordinated inauthentic behavior including shill bidding, fake reviews, or rating manipulation
AcceptableUseConductIpViolation: Violating the intellectual property rights of others, including submitting code that infringes copyrights or patents
AcceptableUseConductKycCircumvent: Circumventing or attempting to circumvent KYC verification requirements
AcceptableUseConductMalicious: Distributing, hosting, or linking to malicious software, phishing pages, or exploit kits
AcceptableUseConductMoneyLaundering: Using the platform to facilitate money laundering, terrorism financing, or any violation of the Anti-Money Laundering Act (RA 9160)
AcceptableUseConductUnauthorizedAccess: Attempting to access other users' accounts, data, or payment information without authorization
AcceptableUseContactDescription: For questions about this Acceptable Use Policy, contact abuse@prtask.com. For legal inquiries, contact legal@prtask.com.
AcceptableUseContentModerationDescriptio: In compliance with the EU Digital Services Act (DSA) 2022/2065, PrTask maintains transparent content moderation policies. Users may flag illegal or harmful content through our reporting mechanism. PrTask processes notices from "trusted flaggers" with priority. PrTask provides a statement of reasons for every content moderation decision, offers an internal complaint handling mechanism, and provides access to out-of-court dispute settlement for users affected by moderation decisions. PrTask publishes annual transparency reports on content moderation activities and decisions. PrTask prohibits dark patterns in content moderation interfaces and ensures that algorithmic decision-making is subject to human review.
AcceptableUseDescriptionParagraph1: This Acceptable Use Policy establishes the rules of conduct for all participants in the PrTask marketplace. It defines prohibited activities including plagiarism, spam, leaderboard manipulation, payment fraud, harassment, and other behaviors that undermine the integrity of the platform. These rules exist to protect the community and ensure that PrTask remains a trustworthy environment for both developers seeking paid work and clients seeking quality code contributions.
AcceptableUseDescriptionParagraph2: Enforcement actions range from warnings to permanent account termination depending on the severity and frequency of violations. PrTask employs both automated detection and manual review to identify policy violations, and provides an appeal process for users who believe enforcement actions were applied in error. All users are expected to maintain professional conduct, submit original work, and comply with applicable laws regarding financial transactions, intellectual property, and anti-money laundering regulations.
AcceptableUseEnforcementAppeal: PrTask reserves the right to take enforcement action at its sole discretion. Users subject to enforcement action may appeal by contacting abuse@prtask.com within 14 days of the action. PrTask will provide a statement of reasons for every content moderation decision as required by the EU Digital Services Act.
AcceptableUseEnforcementContentText: Removal of offending tasks, pull requests, or other content
AcceptableUseEnforcementDescription: Violations may result in account suspension, bounty forfeiture, and permanent ban from the platform.
AcceptableUseEnforcementFinancialText: Freezing of account funds pending investigation of financial violations
AcceptableUseEnforcementLegalText: Reporting of criminal activity to law enforcement authorities, including the AMLC for suspected money laundering
AcceptableUseEnforcementSuspensionText: Suspension of account access for a defined period (7 to 90 days)
AcceptableUseEnforcementTerminationText: Permanent removal from the platform with forfeiture of pending bounties
AcceptableUseEnforcementWarningText: A formal notice identifying the violation and requiring corrective action
AcceptableUseIntroduction: This Acceptable Use Policy governs your conduct on the PrTask platform. All users, including clients and developers, must comply with this policy. Violations may result in enforcement actions including account suspension or termination. This policy complies with the EU Digital Services Act (DSA) content moderation requirements.
AcceptableUseProhibitedCollusion: Colluding with other users to manipulate task outcomes or artificially inflate earnings
AcceptableUseProhibitedDescription: Users must not use PrTask to submit plagiarized code, spam tasks, manipulate leaderboard rankings, or engage in fraudulent payment activities.
AcceptableUseProhibitedFraud: Engaging in fraudulent payment activities or payment manipulation
